posts.author: BakingInGreyford92
posts.text: Just finished mixing my batch of lemon drizzle cake! Got the zest from a couple of lemons and used a good quality flour. Can't wait to pop it in the oven for the weekend gathering.
posts.explanation: The post shares harmless, positive content about baking using generic terms without promoting any policy violation.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
